title: Accelerating Custom Software Development with Generative AI
excerpt: How we leverage advanced AI codegen and agentic workflows to build high-performance web applications 4x faster without compromising code quality.
description: An in-depth look at how NovaDesk integrates Generative AI into our software development lifecycle, speeding up MVP builds and feature delivery.

author.name: Harsh Prateek
author.bio: Harsh is a Full-Stack Engineer and AI architect with 14+ years of experience building digital products for startups.

seoTitle: Accelerating Software Development with AI | NovaDesk Blog
seoDescription: Discover how NovaDesk uses Generative AI and agentic workflows to deliver custom web apps and SaaS 4x faster.

content.text: Generative AI is transforming software engineering. We use custom agents to write boilerplate, run tests, and optimize queries.
